name: Employee Salary Analysis Workflow
description: Create employee data, calculate salary statistics, and generate a summary report

tasks.name: Create employee JSON file
tasks.description: You MUST call file_write to create a file named 'employees.json' containing exactly 5 employee records. Each record must have: name (string), department (string), and salary (number). Use valid JSON array format. Output the full path of the created file and confirm all 5 records were written.
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains confirmation that employees.json was created with 5 employee records in valid JSON format

tasks.name: Calculate salary statistics
tasks.description: You MUST call file_read to read the employees.json file from task_001. Then you MUST call python_exec to calculate: (1) the average salary of all employees, (2) the name and salary of the highest-paid employee. Output the EXACT numerical results with employee name. Do NOT round or summarize. Output format: 'Average salary: $X, Highest paid: Name ($Y)'
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains a specific average salary number and identifies the highest-paid employee by name with their exact salary

tasks.name: Write salary report
tasks.description: You MUST call file_write to create 'salary_report.txt' containing a summary report. The report must include: (1) total number of employees (5), (2) average salary from task_002, (3) highest-paid employee name and salary from task_002. Format it as a readable text report with clear section headers.
tasks.success_criteria: Output confirms that salary_report.txt was created and contains the average salary and highest-paid employee information from task_002
